model.label: MiMo-V2-Flash
model.description: MiMo • Flash-tier model configured through a custom endpoint for fast inference and lightweight agent tasks.

pick.rationale: Iowa State enters as a 2-seed from the Big 12 with a proven track record under coach T.J. Otzelberger, having reached the Sweet 16 twice recently and earning a high seed due to strong conference play and defensive identity. Tennessee State, while riding momentum from an OVC championship and a 23-9 record, faces a significant talent and efficiency gap against a Power 5 opponent that regularly competes at a high level. The Tigers' path relies on hot three-point shooting and forcing turnovers, but Iowa State's disciplined defense, superior rebounding, and experience in high-stakes games make them the reliable pick to advance.

reasoningStep.title: Investigate Team Context and Matchup Dynamics
reasoningStep.summary: Gathered information on both teams' recent form, conference strength, and tournament readiness to assess upset risk and confidence.
reasoningStep.evidence: Iowa State is a 2-seed from the Big 12 with a history of Sweet 16 appearances under Otzelberger, indicating consistent high-level performance. Tennessee State won the OVC tournament with a 23-9 record and a dominant championship win, showing momentum but facing a steep jump in competition. No injury reports were found for either team, and the talent gap favors Iowa State significantly.

result.title: Iowa State Earns No. 2 Seed in 2026 NCAA Tournament
result.snippet: The Cyclones have made the NCAA Tournament every single season under Otzelberger, and have made the Sweet 16 twice in that span. The highest seed Iowa State has earned in the NCAA Tournament is a 2-seed, which has occurred on three separate occasions, in 2000, 2024, and now, 2026 .

result.title: Tigers End 32-Year Drought with OVC Championship, Head to March Madness
result.snippet: The Tigers (23-9) captured the 2026 Ohio Valley Conference Tournament Championship on March 7 with a commanding 93-67 victory over Morehead State at the Ford Center in Evansville, Indiana, securing the league's automatic bid to March Madness and ending a 32-year drought for the program.

result.title: 2026 Ohio Valley Conference men's basketball tournament
result.snippet: The 2026 Ohio Valley Conference Men's Basketball Tournament was the final event of the 2025-26 NCAA Division I men's basketball season in the Ohio Valley Conference . The tournament was held March 4-7, 2026 , at the Ford Center in Evansville, Indiana. [1] The tournament winner, Tennessee State received the conference's automatic bid to the 2026 NCAA Division I men's basketball tournament .

toolCalls.summary: Fetched https://ovcsports.com/news/2026/3/6/2026-ovc-mens-basketball-championship-final.aspx and extracted 3000 characters of text.

result.text: Tennessee State Wins 2026 OVC Men's Basketball Championship - Ohio Valley Conference and tags, as close as possible to the opening tag. Creation Date: 03/29/2022 --> and tags, as close as possible to the opening tag. Creation Date: 09/14/2023 --> Skip To Main Content Ohio Valley Conference The Official website of The Ohio Valley Conference Main Navigation Menu Search: Tennessee State Wins 2026 OVC Men's Basketball Championship 3/7/2026 8:30:02 AM • Tournament Central | Bag Policy | Digital Program | Follow Us on x/Twitter | Facebook | Bracket (PDF) #1 Tennessee State 93, #2 Morehead State 67 Box Score | Live Video | Live Stats | Westwood One | Photo Gallery | Press Conference Video: TSU , MSU #1 TENNESSEE STATE 93, #2 MOREHEAD STATE 67 EVANSVILLE, Ind. - Tennessee State captured the Ohio Valley Conference Tournament championship for the first time in more than three decades, defeating Morehead State 93-67 Saturday night at the Ford Center. Powered by a blistering three-point shooting performance and a dominant effort on the glass, the Tigers secured the league's automatic bid to the NCAA Tournament and improved to 23-9 on the season. The Tigers (23-9) had five players score in double figures, led by Antoine Lorick III, who had 18 points and two blocks. Travis Harper II tacked on 17 points and Carlous Williams helped out with 16 points off the bench. Dante Harris recorded a double-double with 16 points and a game-high 11 rebounds, while Aaron Nkrumah added 11 points and six assists. Tennessee State grabbed 44 rebounds in Saturday's game compared to Morehead State's 29, led by Harris' 11 boards. The Tigers also put in work on the offensive glass, turning 14 rebounds into 14 second chance points. The Tennessee State defense held Morehead State shooters to just 36.2 percent from the field, including 30 percent from three-point range. The Eagles did not get many second opportunities on the offensive end, as they grabbed only eight offensive rebounds and scored nine second chance points while Tennessee State pulled down 30 defensive rebounds. After playing to a 7-7 tie, Tennessee State went on a 13-0 run with 16:46 left in the first half, culminating in a three from Aaron Nkrumah, to take a 20-7 lead. The Tigers then added eight points to that lead by the end of the period and entered halftime with a 55-34 advantage. Tennessee State relied on its three-point shooting in the period, knocking down 12 shots to account for 36 of its 55 points. Following intermission, Tennessee State kept widening that lead, expanding it to 87-65 before going on a 6-0 run, finished off by Jc Brooks' three, to grow the lead to 93-65 with 1:05 to go in the contest. The Eagles narrowed the margin somewhat before the game was over, but the Tigers still cruised the rest of the way for the 93-67 win. Tennessee State got a boost from its bench in the period, as non-starters accounted for 15 of its 38 total points. 2026 OVC Men's Basketball All-Tournament Team Dante Harris, Tenness

modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.
Bracket config id: demo-2026-bracket
Tournament year: 2026
Current game id: r64-midwest-8
Current game label: Midwest 2/15
Round: Round of 64
Resolved teams: Iowa State (iowa-state) vs Tennessee State (tennessee-state)
Prior committed picks: 35
